staticCommands.description: Converts a web.config file to an appsettings.json file

values.name: path
values.description: Path to the file or directory to migrate

values.name: delimiter
values.description: The character in keys to replace with the section delimiter (:)

values.name: prefix
values.description: If provided, an additional namespace to prefix on generated keys
